game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **异常;** "异常" is a single-player puzzle game where players program the AI of robotic units to complete level objectives. In each sequential level, players interact with a visual programming interface, dragging and dropping command blocks or inputting code snippets to define robot behaviors such as "move forward 3 units," "attack nearest enemy," or "wait 2 seconds." After programming, players tap a "Run Simulation" button to observe their robots execute the AI, with success determined by eliminating all enemies or reaching a designated exit point. Progression involves unlocking new levels that introduce additional robot types, environmental hazards, and increasingly complex enemy patterns, requiring players to craft sophisticated AI programs for multiple units to cooperate. Difficulty scales by increasing the number of robots to manage, the intricacy of required AI logic, and the precision needed in command sequencing, with failure occurring if any robot is destroyed or the objective is not met.
game_info.description: Program robotic units to complete challenging levels by creating AI sequences. Use command blocks to define robot behaviors like movement, attacks, and timing. Execute your program to watch robots follow your instructions. Eliminate all enemies or reach the exit to win each level. Manage multiple robots with increasingly complex AI logic as you progress through levels with new hazards and enemy patterns.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate command menu and select commands
Space: Add selected command to program sequence
Shift: Remove last command from sequence
Z: Execute programmed AI sequence
R: Restart game (returns to start screen)
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and command testing. Validates that robots can be programmed with simple movement commands and that the command system works correctly. Tests the fundamental mechanics of adding commands and executing them.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Program a simple sequence of movement commands (forward, turn) to navigate the robot. Execute the sequence and verify the robot moves according to the programmed instructions. Complete early levels with basic command sequences.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Robot successfully executes programmed movement commands. Position updates correctly after each command. Robot can navigate simple layouts and reach objectives using basic command sequences. Test passes when robot completes at least one level successfully.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition testing with optimal strategy. Tests the ability to program robots to complete all level objectives efficiently. Validates that win conditions are properly detected and that complex AI sequences can be created.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyze each level layout, enemy positions, and objectives. Create optimal command sequences for each robot to eliminate enemies or reach exits. Use combinations of movement, attack, and wait commands. Coordinate multiple robots when needed for advanced levels.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all available levels by programming effective AI sequences. All enemies eliminated or exits reached per level objectives. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test demonstrates that the game is winnable with proper strategy and validates all game mechanics work together correctly.
